category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a state-of-the-art SAT solver; official GitHub README describes CaDiCaL as a satisfiability solver.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project homepage use the CaDiCaL casing.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and BUILD.md provide project and build documentation; source_facts.homepage is the official CaDiCaL page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/arminbiere/cadical; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README describes CaDiCaL as a CDCL satisfiability solver.
